reviews.review_description: ive been wanting a br horse game even if the controls are difficult its so good

This game is a lot of fun and has semi realistic controls (it’s not fully realistic because you’d need leg tracking for it to be). It is wonderful how the game is free and I play this game with my sister a lot. Even though the graphics aren’t too realistic, the game is still very immersive and fun.

developer_response.body:
Thanks a ton for loving the game! 😊 Super excited to let you know that the next update is gonna be epic! We're dropping a fresh new map, way better graphics, and some cool new NPC interactions. Plus, missions are getting a major upgrade! Stay tuned and keep playing. We totally appreciate your support and can't wait to bring you more awesome stuff!
Catch you in the game! 🏇🎮
Thank you for your feedback. I'm sorry to hear you had a bad experience. Could you please provide more details on what you think needs improvement? Your input is valuable to me.

reviews.review_description: Is there anything else to say? Can't wait for full release on the app

developer_response.body: Thanks, I will make it as soon as possible

reviews.review_description: It's great but when I get my horse one way it glitches and turns the other way. Overall good but you can't change horses and If you can how? Great game. Okay horses. Nice scenery. Please add more horses.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! I'm glad you enjoyed the game overall. Here are some details regarding your concerns:

Horse Control Glitch: Normally, you should be able to control the horse as described in the tutorial. If you're experiencing issues where the horse glitches and turns the wrong way, please provide more details about the actions you're taking when this happens. This information will help us diagnose and fix the problem.

Changing Horses: You can indeed buy and change horses. To do this, go to the stable and press the 'B' button to enter Horse Management. From there, you can select and switch horses.

We appreciate your suggestions and are working on adding more horses to enhance your experience. Thank you for playing Horse Rider!

reviews.review_description: This is the start of a very fun game. However, some of the motions didn't work when I tried them. Example, the horse would not jump even though I mimicked the movements shown. When I moved the horse forward I ended up with a big icon/logo of the game and that was it. There needs to be an easily accessible tutorial  the controls need to work better & the demo should reflect more gameplay.

developer_response.body: Working on it! The upcoming release of the new DEMO will be a huge improvement, thanks for your continued support!

reviews.review_description: The game is ok but you need to come up with a new one

developer_response.body: Almost there, sorry for the wait
